mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO video_danmaku (task_id, content, appear_time, sentiment_score, sentiment_label) VALUES
(#{danmaku.taskId}, #{danmaku.content}, #{danmaku.appearTime}, #{danmaku.sentimentScore}, #{danmaku.sentimentLabel})
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, content, appear_time AS appearTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY appear_time ASC

SELECT task_id AS taskId, content, appear_time AS appearTime, sentiment_score AS sentimentScore, sentiment_label AS sentimentLabel FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND sentiment_label = #{sentimentLabel} ORDER BY appear_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_danmaku WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
